rows.label: tev056301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bodaboda about his work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bodaboda if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Friend wants to know occupation
of Bodaboda? What for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Almost all Nopon jobs
related to selling things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0003
rows.name:
True businessnopon willing to do whatever it takes
to make sale, whether that mean tunneling underwater,
jumping off cliff, or traveling to ends of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Also, Nopon never turn customers away.
Nopon sell to anyone and everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0009
rows.name:
*whisper murmur* ...need to watch
out for Nopon who look tired or
floppy or gloomy or mopey...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Huh? Friend want to know what
Bodaboda sells? Mo! Friend should
know better than to ask![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0011
rows.name:
All friend needs to know is that Nopon have their
limits. So when ugly xenos attack and business
starts to go south, Nopon get frustrated![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Nopon need to find ways to let
off steam. We no different
from human friends in this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bodaboda about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ooh! Bodaboda really likes idea
from Zazazan. So how about this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0014
rows.name:
We can shape pot stickers to
look like Bodaboda! Then
Bodaboda become face of brand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Bodaboda will be all over packaging
and posters! Someone could even
make Bodaboda plushie![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Ooh, and maybe one day they
build Bodabodaland right here
in Mira. Time to dream big![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Friend was big help in aiding Bodaboda
and Zazazan with sneaking cargo right
under snooty nose of Loma![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0021
rows.name:
This time Bodaboda really pull wool over
eyes. Foolish Loma will never suspect goods
were brought in with help of mighty BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Hmm? Friend wants to know
what is inside? Friend should
know better than to ask! Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056301_MSG0023
rows.name:
All friend needs to know is that we are
partners now. Soon friend will be filthy
rich just like Bodaboda and Zazazan![ST:wait ]
